sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93556" key="seira/w1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σειράω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σειρά</etym>) <sense id="n93556.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bind</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">draw with a rope</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
